heading: Disposal of town sites set apart prior toJune 27, 1906
label: 563 Disposal of town sites set apart prior toJune 27, 1906
text: Any town site set apart or established prior to , by proclamation of the President, under the provisions of sections 711 and 712 of this title, within or in the vicinity of any reclamation project, may be appraised and disposed of in accordance with the provisions of and all necessary expenses incurred in the appraisal and sale of lands embraced within any such town site shall be paid from the reclamation fund, and the proceeds of the sales of such lands shall be covered into the reclamation fund.June 27, 19061section 562 of this titleSee References in Text note below.1
notes: References in TextSections 711 and 712 of this title, referred to in text, were repealed by , , .Pub. L. 94–579, title VII, § 703(a)90 Stat. 2789Oct. 21, 1976
amendments: References in TextSections 711 and 712 of this title, referred to in text, were repealed by , , .Pub. L. 94–579, title VII, § 703(a)90 Stat. 2789Oct. 21, 1976
